description: Meal Generation UX Improvements — background generation, auto-daily meal plans, pantry-based ingredient selection for meal generation

userStories.title: Background meal generation — don't block user on spinner screen
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/recipes/presentation/recipe_suggestions_screen.dart
Read lib/features/recipes/presentation/recipe_generation_provider.dart
When user taps 'Cook with these' or triggers AI generation, show a SnackBar 'Generating meal suggestions...' and allow navigation away
RecipeGenerationNotifier must continue generating even if suggestions screen is disposed
When generation completes, show a SnackBar 'Suggestions ready! Tap to view' with action to navigate to suggestions screen
If user is still on suggestions screen when generation completes, show results immediately
If generation fails, show error SnackBar instead of blocking error screen
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Currently recipe_suggestions_screen.dart:101-117 shows a blocking spinner. The provider should be a StateNotifierProvider (not autoDispose) so it survives screen disposal. Use ScaffoldMessenger for SnackBars that persist across navigation.

userStories.title: Auto-generate daily meal plan toggle (PRO feature)
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/meals/presentation/meal_plan_screen.dart
Read lib/features/settings/presentation/settings_screen.dart
Add 'Auto-generate daily meal plan' toggle to settings screen under a 'Meals' section
Toggle is PRO-gated — free users see the toggle with a lock icon, tapping navigates to /paywall
Store preference in Hive (key: 'auto_generate_meals', default: false)
On meal_plan_screen load, if toggle is on AND no meals exist for today, auto-trigger generation
Auto-generation uses the day type from PrescriptionEngine (push/normal/easy/rest) to set calorie targets
Show a subtle banner 'Auto-generating today's plan...' during generation, not a blocking spinner
If generation is already in progress, don't trigger duplicate
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Use Hive.box('settings').get('auto_generate_meals', defaultValue: false). Check currentPlanTierProvider before allowing toggle. The day type mapping is in today_nutrition_provider.dart _planTypeToDayType(). Don't use Supabase for this preference — it's a local device setting.

userStories.title: Ingredient selection sheet for meal generation
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/pantry/presentation/pantry_screen.dart for existing 'Cook with these' pattern
Read lib/features/meals/presentation/meal_plan_screen.dart
Create lib/features/meals/presentation/ingredient_selection_sheet.dart
Sheet has two sections: 'Type ingredients' text field at top, 'From pantry' list below
Text field accepts comma-separated ingredient names (free text)
Pantry section shows available (non-expired) items from pantry with checkboxes
Select/deselect pantry items to include in generation
'Generate Plan' button at bottom passes selected ingredients + typed ingredients to meal plan generator
This option is PRO-gated — free users see 'Upgrade to generate from ingredients'
Add a button in meal_plan_screen.dart to open this sheet: 'Generate from ingredients'
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Reuse pantryRepositoryProvider to load pantry items. PantryItemEntity has name, category, quantity, unit, isAvailable, expiryDate. Filter to isAvailable=true and non-expired. Pass ingredients as List<String> to the meal generation provider.

userStories.title: Wire ingredient-based generation to AI orchestrator
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/meals/presentation/meal_plan_screen.dart generation logic
Read lib/shared/core/ai/ai_orchestrator_service.dart for workflow patterns
When generating from ingredients, include the ingredient list in the AI prompt context
AI prompt should say: 'Generate meals using these available ingredients: [list]. Fill gaps with common items.'
Generated meals should prioritize the specified ingredients
If no ingredients specified, fall back to standard generation (current behavior)
Generation must go through ai_orchestrator_service — never direct API calls
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: The AI orchestrator uses workflow types. Add ingredient context to the existing 'generate_meal_plan' workflow. The context builder should include ingredients as a field. Deterministic fallback should still work when AI is unavailable.
